lines: We're all just sawdust in the end
What you build will break what breaks you build again
Why you holding on to castle walls you couldn't mould
Let it go let it fall
Sawdust in the end but while we're here
See the king in the mirror finally clear
They built it once and life reduced it all to ash
We'll build it back three times
